digest.component_or_area: plan-review and code-review convergence floor config defaults
propositions: Flip the default of remediation_mode and novelty_drop_active from False to True in VerifyConfig so the plan-review rising floor and code-review region-gated floor activate by default.
novelty_drop_active is a shared gate consumed by both plan-review and the code-review region-gated floor, so flipping it deliberately activates the code-review floor too.

Field evidence (verdict instability on identical plans, remediation edits minting new findings, gate compute in the 4+-round tail) justifies enabling the floors and superseding the discriminates_novelty eval prerequisite.
A rule-based grep sweep must update all stale default-OFF / inert-by-default framing for the two flags and their floors across src, tests, and docs, naming explicit false as the back-out.
completion_floor_active and the floor math/threshold parameters remain unchanged as non-goals.
Tests must prove default-ON activates each floor's config gate while explicit False restores the byte-identical full-review off-path.
